steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0022 and t0024 dependencies completed; inspect their outputs.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure (assets/predictions, data, code, plan, research, results).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: literature already surveyed in t0015-t0019; no new paper reading needed for V_rest sweep.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no new external information required; biophysics of V_rest modulation is well-established.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0022 and t0024 tuning-curve drivers and library asset structure to design the V_rest wrapper.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the wrapper drivers, trial counts, aggregation strategy, and plot layout.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: runs entirely on the local Windows workstation via NEURON + Python.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Write run_vrest_sweep_t0022.py and run_vrest_sweep_t0024.py; execute the two sweeps; aggregate per-model tidy CSVs.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines to tear down.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: task scope is a prescribed parameter sweep; alternative approaches are not in scope.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Produce polar plots (per-V_rest and overlay), results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare V_rest-dependent DSI and peak firing rate against published DSGC recordings.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write suggestions.json with follow-up experiments motivated by V_rest dependence findings.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Finalize predictions assets, run verificators, prepare PR, close the task.
